name: intermediate-manual-empty-plan
purpose: Semantic corner case: the empty plan is sufficient because every start state already satisfies the goal.

name: intermediate-manual-vacuous-precondition
purpose: Semantic corner case: the precondition is false everywhere, so Khm holds vacuously.

name: intermediate-manual-safe-plan
purpose: A two-step plan reaches the goal and its only intermediate state satisfies the constraint.

name: intermediate-manual-unsafe-middle-failure
purpose: The goal is reachable, but the only intermediate state violates the intermediate constraint.

name: intermediate-manual-nondet-safe-success
purpose: The first action is nondeterministic, but all intermediate successors satisfy the constraint.

name: intermediate-manual-nondet-unsafe-failure
purpose: One nondeterministic intermediate successor violates the constraint, so the plan is not guaranteed.

name: intermediate-manual-multistart-success
purpose: The same safe plan works from all states satisfying the precondition.

name: intermediate-manual-multistart-one-bad
purpose: One precondition state is forced through an unsafe intermediate state.

name: intermediate-manual-dead-end-failure
purpose: The available path reaches a non-goal dead end, so no plan can guarantee the goal.

name: intermediate-robot-safe-corridor-positive
purpose: Robot corridor case study: the safe action keeps all intermediate positions safe before reaching the goal.

name: intermediate-robot-unsafe-corridor-negative
purpose: Robot corridor case study: the goal is reachable, but every route passes through an unsafe intermediate position.

name: intermediate-robot-risky-branch-negative
purpose: Robot corridor case study: a risky action may either progress safely or fall into an unsafe trap.

name: intermediate-rescue-safe-route-positive
purpose: Autonomous rescue case study: the robot can complete the rescue while every strict intermediate state remains safe.

name: intermediate-rescue-smoke-route-negative
purpose: Autonomous rescue case study: the survivor is reachable, but every rescue route must pass through an unsafe smoke zone before the goal.

name: intermediate-corridor-positive-8
purpose: Linear corridor positive baseline: all strict intermediate states satisfy the constraint.

name: intermediate-corridor-positive-16
purpose: Linear corridor positive baseline: all strict intermediate states satisfy the constraint.

name: intermediate-corridor-positive-32
purpose: Linear corridor positive baseline: all strict intermediate states satisfy the constraint.

name: intermediate-corridor-unsafe-middle-8
purpose: Linear corridor negative baseline: the goal is reachable but one strict intermediate state is unsafe.

name: intermediate-corridor-unsafe-middle-16
purpose: Linear corridor negative baseline: the goal is reachable but one strict intermediate state is unsafe.

name: intermediate-corridor-unsafe-middle-32
purpose: Linear corridor negative baseline: the goal is reachable but one strict intermediate state is unsafe.

name: intermediate-corridor-broken-8
purpose: Linear corridor negative baseline: the path stops before the goal.

name: intermediate-corridor-broken-16
purpose: Linear corridor negative baseline: the path stops before the goal.

name: intermediate-corridor-broken-32
purpose: Linear corridor negative baseline: the path stops before the goal.

name: intermediate-branching-depth-safe-d4
purpose: Depth sweep with fixed branching width: all nondeterministic intermediate states are safe.

name: intermediate-branching-depth-safe-d6
purpose: Depth sweep with fixed branching width: all nondeterministic intermediate states are safe.

name: intermediate-branching-depth-safe-d8
purpose: Depth sweep with fixed branching width: all nondeterministic intermediate states are safe.

name: intermediate-branching-depth-unsafe-d4
purpose: Depth sweep with fixed branching width: one nondeterministic branch reaches an unsafe intermediate state.

name: intermediate-branching-depth-unsafe-d6
purpose: Depth sweep with fixed branching width: one nondeterministic branch reaches an unsafe intermediate state.

name: intermediate-branching-depth-unsafe-d8
purpose: Depth sweep with fixed branching width: one nondeterministic branch reaches an unsafe intermediate state.

name: intermediate-branching-width-safe-w2
purpose: Width sweep with fixed depth: all nondeterministic branches maintain the intermediate constraint.

name: intermediate-branching-width-safe-w3
purpose: Width sweep with fixed depth: all nondeterministic branches maintain the intermediate constraint.

name: intermediate-branching-width-unsafe-w2
purpose: Width sweep with fixed depth: increasing width includes an unsafe branch.

name: intermediate-branching-width-unsafe-w3
purpose: Width sweep with fixed depth: increasing width includes an unsafe branch.

name: intermediate-multistart-all-good-w2
purpose: Precondition sweep: the same safe plan works from every precondition state.

name: intermediate-multistart-all-good-w4
purpose: Precondition sweep: the same safe plan works from every precondition state.

name: intermediate-multistart-all-good-w8
purpose: Precondition sweep: the same safe plan works from every precondition state.

name: intermediate-multistart-one-unsafe-w2
purpose: Precondition sweep: one precondition state is forced through an unsafe intermediate state.

name: intermediate-multistart-one-unsafe-w4
purpose: Precondition sweep: one precondition state is forced through an unsafe intermediate state.

name: intermediate-multistart-one-unsafe-w8
purpose: Precondition sweep: one precondition state is forced through an unsafe intermediate state.

name: intermediate-action-count-safe-last-k2
purpose: Action-count sweep with fixed path length: only the last action maintains the intermediate constraint and reaches the goal.

name: intermediate-action-count-safe-last-k4
purpose: Action-count sweep with fixed path length: only the last action maintains the intermediate constraint and reaches the goal.

name: intermediate-action-count-safe-last-k8
purpose: Action-count sweep with fixed path length: only the last action maintains the intermediate constraint and reaches the goal.

name: intermediate-action-count-no-safe-k2
purpose: Action-count sweep with fixed path length: every action either reaches a trap or violates the intermediate constraint.

name: intermediate-action-count-no-safe-k4
purpose: Action-count sweep with fixed path length: every action either reaches a trap or violates the intermediate constraint.

name: intermediate-action-count-no-safe-k8
purpose: Action-count sweep with fixed path length: every action either reaches a trap or violates the intermediate constraint.

name: intermediate-path-length-safe-last-n8
purpose: Path-length sweep with fixed action count: the safe action must be repeated until the goal is reached.

name: intermediate-path-length-safe-last-n16
purpose: Path-length sweep with fixed action count: the safe action must be repeated until the goal is reached.

name: intermediate-path-length-safe-last-n24
purpose: Path-length sweep with fixed action count: the safe action must be repeated until the goal is reached.

name: intermediate-path-length-unsafe-n8
purpose: Path-length sweep with fixed action count: the available route has an unsafe strict intermediate state.

name: intermediate-path-length-unsafe-n16
purpose: Path-length sweep with fixed action count: the available route has an unsafe strict intermediate state.

name: intermediate-path-length-unsafe-n24
purpose: Path-length sweep with fixed action count: the available route has an unsafe strict intermediate state.

name: intermediate-formula-depth-positive-32
purpose: Formula-size sweep with fixed model and fixed witness length.

name: intermediate-formula-depth-positive-64
purpose: Formula-size sweep with fixed model and fixed witness length.

name: intermediate-formula-depth-positive-128
purpose: Formula-size sweep with fixed model and fixed witness length.
